title: Server Info Reporting Flow
description: Gathering and returning server metadata via ServerInfoController extension endpoint (GET /serverInfo)
activity_flow: START: HTTP GET request arrives at /serverInfo (api subdomain)
GUARD: allowedUsernames check enforced by @Controller decorator — unauthorised requests are rejected
COLLECT OS data: os.platform(), os.type(), os.release() → osData {platform, type, release, pretty}
COLLECT CPU data: os.cpus() → cpuData {model: cpus[0].model, cores: cpus.length}
COLLECT RAM data: os.totalmem(), os.freemem() → ramData {total, free, totalGB, freeGB}
COLLECT UPTIME data: os.uptime() → uptimeData {seconds, days, hours, minutes, pretty string}
TRY: await fs.statfs('/') — attempt disk stats
[success branch] Compute totalGB = blocks*bsize/1073741824, freeGB = bfree*bsize/1073741824, usedGB = total-free → diskData {total, free, used}
[failure branch] Catch error → console.error('Disk stats error') → diskData = {total:'N/A', free:'N/A', used:'N/A'}
ASSEMBLE response object: {os, cpu, ram, uptime, disk, loadavg, hostname}
res.json(response) — send JSON back to caller

branching_conditions.false_path: Set disk to N/A, log error to console

key_relationships: Controller decorator binds route '/serverInfo' with allowedUsernames ACL
Get decorator maps HTTP GET '' on subdomain 'api' to getServerInfo
Client-side getServerInfo() (UIWindowSystemInfo.js) calls XHR GET /serverInfo → triggers this flow
Client-side getServerInfoFormatted() wraps getServerInfo(), maps response to render-ready array
method_signatures: async getServerInfo(_req: Request, res: Response): void  [ServerInfoController]
async getServerInfo(options?): Promise<any>  [UIWindowSystemInfo.js — client XHR wrapper]
async getServerInfoFormatted(): Promise<Array>  [UIWindowSystemInfo.js — formats raw response]

response_shape.disk: { total, free, used }  (GB strings, or 'N/A' on error)

important_notes: Extension loaded via extension.import('extensionController'). Route registered at startup by calling registerRoutes(). Access restricted to config.allowedUsernames. Disk stats use Node 18+ fs.statfs API — failure is silently swallowed with N/A fallback. All other metrics are synchronous OS calls except disk.
